TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract beforefieldinit EmbeddingGenerationDispatcher extends System.Object

Docs.summary: Represents a supported embedding type for a vector store provider. This is an internal support type meant for use by connectors only and not by applications.
Docs.remarks: Each instance encapsulates both build-time embedding type resolution and runtime embedding generation for a specific subtype.

MemberSignature.Value: protected EmbeddingGenerationDispatcher ();
.method familyhidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed
Protected Sub New ()
protected: EmbeddingGenerationDispatcher();
public abstract bool CanGenerateEmbedding (Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.ProviderServices.VectorPropertyModel vectorProperty, Microsoft.Extensions.AI.IEmbeddingGenerator embeddingGenerator);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance bool CanGenerateEmbedding(class Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.ProviderServices.VectorPropertyModel vectorProperty, class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.IEmbeddingGenerator embeddingGenerator) cil managed
Public MustOverride Function CanGenerateEmbedding (vectorProperty As VectorPropertyModel, embeddingGenerator As IEmbeddingGenerator) As Boolean
abstract member CanGenerateEmbedding : Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.ProviderServices.VectorPropertyModel * Microsoft.Extensions.AI.IEmbeddingGenerator -> bool

public: abstract bool CanGenerateEmbedding(Microsoft::Extensions::VectorData::ProviderServices::VectorPropertyModel ^ vectorProperty, Microsoft::Extensions::AI::IEmbeddingGenerator ^ embeddingGenerator);

Docs.summary: Checks whether the given can produce embeddings of this type for any of the input types supported by the given . This is used for native vector property types (e.g., of ), where embedding generation is only needed for search and the input type is not known at model-build time.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.ProviderServices.EmbeddingGenerationDispatcher Create<TEmbedding> () where TEmbedding : Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Embedding;

Docs.summary: Creates a new for the given type.

member this.EmbeddingType : Type

Docs.summary: Gets the type that this instance supports.

Docs.summary: Generates a single embedding of this type from the given , using the embedding generator configured on the .

Docs.summary: Generates embeddings of this type from the given , using the embedding generator configured on the .

MemberSignature.Value: public abstract Type? ResolveEmbeddingType (Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.ProviderServices.VectorPropertyModel vectorProperty, Microsoft.Extensions.AI.IEmbeddingGenerator embeddingGenerator, Type? userRequestedEmbeddingType);

Docs.summary: Attempts to resolve the embedding type for the given , using the given .
Docs.returns: The resolved embedding type, or if the generator does not support this embedding type.
